features.name: parameterized interface with typedef using bits on local signal
features.description: Code should include a parameterized interface with a width parameter, containing a logic signal whose width depends on the parameter, and a typedef that uses $bits(type(...)) on that signal

features.name: multiple interface instances with different parameter values
features.description: Code should include multiple instances of the same parameterized interface, each with a different width parameter value

features.name: type cast of typedef applied to width-parameterized signal
features.description: Code should include a type cast using a typedef inside a parameterized interface, applied to a signal whose width depends on the interface parameter
